title: Upon Sneape. Epig.
content:
Sneape has a face so brittle, that it breaks
    Forth into blushes whensoe'er he speaks.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Robert Herrick delivers a powerful performance in "Upon Sneape. Epig."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
